name: threatbook-ngtip-v5
description: OctoBus package for ThreatBook NGTIP V5 intelligence queries (IP reputation, DNS compromised, file reputation, vulnerability, IP location).

ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5.ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5/.name: query-ip-reputation
ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5.ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5/.description: Query ThreatBook NGTIP V5 IP reputation.

ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5.ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5/.name: query-dns-compromised
ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5.ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5/.description: Query ThreatBook NGTIP V5 DNS compromised / malicious domain detection.

ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5.ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5/.name: query-file-reputation
ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5.ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5/.description: Query ThreatBook NGTIP V5 file hash reputation.

ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5.ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5/.name: query-vulnerability
ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5.ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5/.description: Query ThreatBook NGTIP V5 vulnerability intelligence.

ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5.ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5/.name: query-ip-location
ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5.ThreatBook_NGTIP_V5/.description: Query ThreatBook NGTIP V5 IP geolocation.
